name: MegaMenu
description: Full-width dropdown for site-wide navigation with columns.

api.name: MegaMenu
api.description: Full-width dropdown for site-wide navigation with columns.

records.name: MegaMenuContext
records.signature:
MegaMenuContext(
        string? ActiveItemId,
        EventCallback<string?> SetActiveItemId,
        Lumeo.Orientation Orientation,
        IReadOnlyList<string> ItemIds,
        IReadOnlySet<string> DisabledItemIds,
        string? RovingItemId,
        Action<string, bool> RegisterItem,
        Action<string> UnregisterItem,
        Action<string> SetRovingItem)

examples.title: Basic Mega Menu
examples.code:
<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="3">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/components" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/templates" Title="Templates" Description="Starter templates" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/docs" Title="Documentation" Description="Full API reference" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Pricing" Href="/pricing" />
</MegaMenu>

examples.title: Single Column Panel
examples.code:
<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Company">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="1" FullWidth="false">
            <MegaMenuGroup>
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/about" Title="About Us" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="/careers" Title="Careers" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
</MegaMenu>

examples.title: Icons and Disabled Item
examples.code:
<MegaMenu>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products" Icon="Lucide.Box">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="2">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="Lucide.Component" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="Lucide.LayoutTemplate" Title="Templates" Description="Starter page templates" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="Lucide.Terminal" Title="CLI" Description="Command-line tooling" />
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Icon="Lucide.BookOpen" Title="API Reference" Description="Complete API docs" Disabled="true" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Docs" Icon="Lucide.FileText" Href="#" />
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Archived" Disabled="true" />
</MegaMenu>

examples.title: Orientation — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_orientationSel" Options="_orientationOptions" />
<MegaMenu Orientation="@_activeOrientation">
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Products">
        <MegaMenuPanel Columns="2">
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Design">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Title="Components" Description="Pre-built UI components" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
            <MegaMenuGroup Title="Development">
                <MegaMenuLink Href="#" Title="CLI" Description="Command-line tooling" />
            </MegaMenuGroup>
        </MegaMenuPanel>
    </MegaMenuItem>
    <MegaMenuItem Label="Docs" Href="#" />
</MegaMenu>

@code {
    private string _orientationSel = "Horizontal";
    private Lumeo.Orientation _activeOrientation =>
        Enum.Parse<Lumeo.Orientation>(_orientationSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _orientationOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Horizontal", Value = "Horizontal" },
        new() { Label = "Vertical", Value = "Vertical" },
    };
}

mdSummary:
# MegaMenu

Full-width dropdown for site-wide navigation with columns.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/mega-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MegaMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenu | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` |  |
| MegaMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuGroup | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Context | `MegaMenu.MegaMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Label | `string` | `string.Empty` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Icon | `SvgIcon?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Href | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Href | `string` | `"#"` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Title | `string` | `string.Empty` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Icon | `SvgIcon?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuLink | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuPanel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuPanel | FullWidth | `bool` | `true` |  |
| MegaMenuPanel | Columns | `int` | `4` |  |
| MegaMenuPanel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MegaMenuPanel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (MegaMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MegaMenuGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MegaMenuItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MegaMenuPanel) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `MegaMenuGroup`, `MegaMenuItem`, `MegaMenuLink`, `MegaMenuPanel`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`MegaMenu.MegaMenuContext`)

## Services it injects
- `NavigationManager` ()
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<MegaMenu />
```

## CSS variables
